meaning: adj.久坐的,坐惯的,土生的,不移栖的,沉积的n.惯于久坐的人
examples: I don't think a sedentary life would altogether suit me.
Obesity and a sedentary lifestyle has been linked with an increased risk of heart disease.
People suffer from obesity because of sedentary study or work.
They are living more sedentary lifestyles, eating more unhealthily, smoking more and drinking more alcohol.
It recommends 150 minutes a week, and "reducing and minimising periods of sedentary behaviour".
